_description: Symbol definitions for ARR_ATOM_CXX BluePrint generation. Each symbol represents a dimension that varies across otherwise-identical test blocks.
_note: CXX is a cross-socket module (no _CPU1 dual-die variants). Has ECC-on (ECCON/ECCSBFDV) and low-operating-point (LO) test flows not present in CXPKGS9.

FREQ_CORNER.description: Frequency corner for VMIN search tests. F1 is the lowest standard corner, F4 the highest.
FREQ_CORNER.applies_to: Main VminTC/MTT search tests, ECCON VminTC (F1-F4), patlist freq tags, FlowMatrix freq references, DROPOUT expressions, CornerIdentifiers, VminResult keys, StartVoltagesForRetry/Offset

COVERAGE_TYPE.description: Coverage variant for array tests: COMBINED=all arrays, SSA_L2DATA=L2 data arrays only.
COVERAGE_TYPE.applies_to: Main VminTC/MTT test name suffix, patlist coverage tags. Note: CXX has no SSA or MEC standalone coverage.
COVERAGE_TYPE.note: CXX only has COMBINED and SSA_L2DATA (unlike CXPKGS9 which also has SSA, MEC)

MODULE_INDEX.description: L2 cache module index (M0-M3). Each physical module is tested independently in the SSA/LSA raster repair pipeline.
MODULE_INDEX.applies_to: SSA/LSA raster pipeline: CAPPKTS/NVLRasterExtension/REP2FUSE test names (_M0_1, _M1_1...), patlist module tags (_m0_, _m1_...), SCBD BypassPort refs, DecoderMatchLabel, SharedStorage keys

VOLTAGE_CORNER.description: Voltage corner for raster capture/repair tests. MIN=minimum voltage, MAX=maximum voltage.
VOLTAGE_CORNER.applies_to: SSA/LSA raster pipeline test names (VCCIA_MIN_X, VCCIA_MAX_X), SharedStorage keys

SSA_ARRAY_TYPE.description: SSA array type: L2_DATA covers data arrays, L2_TAG covers tag arrays.
SSA_ARRAY_TYPE.applies_to: SSA raster pipeline test names and patlists

LSA_ARRAY_TYPE.description: LSA array type: L2_C6 (C6 retention), L2_LRU (least recently used), L2_STATE (state arrays).
LSA_ARRAY_TYPE.applies_to: LSA raster pipeline test names and patlists

REP_DIRECTION.description: Repair direction: VMIN-side vs VMAX-side repair flag.
REP_DIRECTION.applies_to: ScreenTC SETLOCAL/SETL2RR/REVERT tests, Screen repair flag tests, AuxiliaryTC SET_xREP_FLAG

L2_ENDCPU_TYPE.description: L2 sub-array tested at ENDCPU: TAG or DATA.

HRY_PHASE.description: HRY test phase: PRE runs before repair, POST runs after repair.

RASTERLOOP_TYPE.description: PatConfig raster loop type: VMAXRASTERLOOP or VMINRASTERLOOP.

PMUX_INDEX.description: Power-mux callback index (0-3), one per ATOM compute cluster.
PMUX_INDEX.applies_to: ENDCPU RunCallback PMUX_CO_FREQ test names, CDIE_ATOM freq references in callbacks

ECC_FREQ.description: ECC frequency corner for ECCON/ECCSBFDV tests within the F5-domain flow. F5=lowest, F7=highest.
ECC_FREQ.applies_to: CtvTokensTC ECCSBFDV test names (_VCCIA_F5_X_, _VCCIA_F6_X_, _VCCIA_F7_X_), ECCON_VMINTC VminTC tests, RunCallback ECCON json params (per_array_f5/f6/f7.json), ScreenTC SCREEN_ECCON_VMIN_F5/F6/F7 test names, SetPointsPreInstance AT_F5/F6/F7_FREQ references
ECC_FREQ.note: Only applies to F5XAT and F5XATLO flow domains. F1-F4 ECCSBFDV tests use the same FREQ_CORNER symbol instead.

ECC_MODULE.description: ECCSBFDV CtvTokensTC module index. M0=base test (no name suffix), M1/M2/M3 have _M1/_M2/_M3 suffixes.
ECC_MODULE.applies_to: CtvTokensTC ECCSBFDV test names (_ECCSBFDV_L2_DATA → M0 base, _ECCSBFDV_L2_DATA_M1 → M1, etc.), patlist module tags (_m0_, _m1_...), PrePlist VoltageConverter overrides (ATOM0:ATOMM0 → ATOM1:ATOMM1 etc.)
ECC_MODULE.note: M0 base test has NO suffix in the test name. Only M1/M2/M3 have explicit _MN suffixes. Body differs by patlist _mN_ tag and PrePlist ATOMN:ATOMMN target.
